capabilities.target: serial device paths such as /dev/tty*, /dev/cu*, and COM*
capabilities.justification: The smoke command reads Board VM response bytes from a user-selected serial device.

capabilities.target: serial device paths such as /dev/tty*, /dev/cu*, and COM*
capabilities.justification: The smoke command writes Board VM request bytes to a user-selected serial device.

justification: This host CLI is an explicit hardware smoke-test boundary. It opens user-selected serial ports and delegates protocol framing/session logic to Board VM crates.
